heaviest_rainfall.status: Ranked top for total rainfall, today's storm had precipitation totalling 39.19mm, falling at 2.2mm per hour at times during the 118.0 hour long storm.

heaviest_rainrate.status: The heaviest rain rate registered stands at 27.0mm per hour on 02 September 2025, highlighting an extreme precipitation event.  21.19mm fell during the storm over 15.0 hours.

longest_rain.status: A storm today ranked highest for the longest continuous rainfall according to our records, lasting a total of118.0 hours.  It came with 39.19mm of rainfall, at times, falling at 2.2mm per hour.

most_lightning.status: The most lightning activity recorded in a single day is 23, which occurred on 07 September 2025 (since our records began on 11 April 2025).

storm.status: There is a storm around.  It's the first significant stormy weather event since 08 November 2025.

top_10_dry.status: The longest dry period started on 24 April 2025 and lasted for 19 days.

top_10_rainy.status: It is currently one of the longest rainy periods.  It is the ranked 9th since our records started in 23 September 2024.  There have been 8 consecutive days where it has been rainy starting on 07 November 2025.  The longest rainy period started on 30 November 2024 and lasted for 10 days.

cold_snaps.status: There is no cold snap at the moment.  This year has experienced 6 cold snaps, with an average of 3.7 per year.

extreme.status: The record temperature difference stands at 26.7°C (0.4 - 27.1°C), set on 29 April 2025.

heatwaves.status: There is not a heatwaves right now.  There have been 6 this year, compared to a usual average of 1.9.

tropical.status: The previous tropical night was on 18 July 2025, with only 62 in total since 1973.

average.status: The current average daily wind direction is southerly (187°).  In the UK, a southerly wind usually brings milder, moist air from the Atlantic.

gusts.status: To date, the maximum wind gust recorded is 93.7 mph on 13 October 2012.

run.status: The top recorded wind run is 1737 miles on 21 October 2012.

speed.status: The record wind speed remains at 93.7 mph from 13 October 2012.

top_10_windy.status: The longest windy period started on 11 October 2012 and lasted for 21 days.

summary.description:
Today, more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 6%) and rainfall (up 0.2 mm).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 360 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in cloud levels (up 447 m), rainfall (down 0.1 mm), feels like temperature (down 2.5°C), and outside temperature (down 2.3°C) when compared to today.

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 359.8m lower than yesterday, 231.5m lower than the past week, 447.4m lower than the past month.

Yesterday’s cloud levels showed a low of 637m and a peak of 1658m, averaging 593.6m; the week and month recorded warmer averages.

summary.summary: Inside; a mild and comfortable temperature is anticipated. Outside; pleasant, mild temperatures. Also, humidity should not be a concern and very little to no wind will be present. Showers, fog or low cloud is expected, and overcast conditions will limit sunlight. Low pressure may bring unsettled weather.
